title: knautia macedonica f. lyrophylla
intro: Knautia macedonica f. lyrophylla, also known as Macedonian scabious or lyrophylla knautia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Dipsacaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it beneficial for various health issues. Its health benefits include soothing digestive problems, calming respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Knautia macedonica f. lyrophylla can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
